CONTENT.Club career: Born in Aubervilliers, Ghandri spent his youth career with a number of Paris-based sides, playing for Ivry, Red Star and Drancy. In 2013, he signed a two-year amateur contract with Ligue 2 club AC Arles.On 30 August 2021, he returned to Club Africain on a two-year contract.On 6 February 2024, Ghandri signed a contract with Russian Premier League club Akhmat Grozny until June 2026.
CONTENT.External links: Nader Ghandri at WorldFootball.netNader Ghandri at Soccerway
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 4 August 2024As of matches played on 28 March 2023
CONTENT.International career: In 2015, Ghandri was a member of the Tunisia under-23 national team at the 2015 U-23 Africa Cup of Nations in Senegal, making two appearances in the tournament.He made his debut for Tunisia national football team on 7 June 2019 in a friendly against Iraq, as a starter.

SUMMARY: Nader Ghandri (Arabic: نادر الغندري; born 18 February 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Russian club Akhmat Grozny. Born in France, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
